steps.title: 41. Verify Tradesman is still logged in on TradeMate
42. Click "View Details" on the first job in the listing
43. Click "Complete Registration" and select trade category (Plumber)
44. Set map location for the Tradesman profile
45. Fill in Tradesman profile information
46. Upload profile documents and submit the profile form
47. Attempt to view job details — expect "View Subscriptions Plans" (unapproved wall)
48. Click "View Subscription Plans" to navigate to subscription page
49. Select subscription plan 3
50. Fill in payment details and complete subscription purchase
51. Navigate back to TradeMate home page after subscription
52. Tradesman logs out (will be re-used in Scenario 8)

steps.title: 61. Tradesman navigates to login page and logs in
62. Switch to Tradesman Mailsac inbox tab (Tab 3) and reload

65. Click the "Account Verified Successfully" email to open it
66. Navigate back to TradeMate website (sitePage)
67. Click "View Details" on the first job in the listing
68. Provide a quote of £1000 for the job
69. Wait a few seconds on the job page after quote submission
70. Poll Mailsac — wait for "Quote submitted successfully!" email
71. Switch to Tradesman Mailsac tab and reload to show quote email
72. Click the "Quote submitted successfully!" email to open it
73. Return to TradeMate website before logout
74. Tradesman logs out
